problem id: bad798af
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5) OR SHL(1)

examples:
  00000011 -> 01100110
  01011000 -> 10111011
  11010100 -> 10111010
  00010101 -> 10101010
  00000000 -> 00000000
  10111100 -> 11111111
  01101000 -> 11011101
  01011101 -> 10111011

query: 11011110
predicted answer: 11111111
